query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers) as total_customers,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT buildingId) FROM customers WHERE buildingId IS NOT NULL) as unique_building_ids,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT fieldManager) FROM customers WHERE fieldManager IS NOT NULL) as unique_field_managers,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workers WHERE name NOT IN ('Admin User')) as field_manager_workers;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers) as total_customers,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT buildingId) FROM customers WHERE buildingId IS NOT NULL) as unique_building_ids,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT fieldManager) FROM customers WHERE fieldManager IS NOT NULL) as unique_field_managers,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workers WHERE name NOT IN ('Admin User')) as field_manager_workers;
